title: Constant Contact vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs Loops: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Loops?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Loops?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
